Pausing this new ICE facility outside Gilroy is welcome news, but the fight isn’t over. @RepJimmyPanetta, our Bay Area colleagues, and I remain committed to ensuring that no detention facility gets built and that ICE is reined in and held accountable.

I was honored to be invited to the ribbon cutting of Inertia Enterprises’ brand new headquarters in Livermore on Friday! As the ranking member of @sciencedems, I’m thrilled to see the future of clean, safe fusion energy being developed right here in the Bay Area. https://t.co/OxSjBP7r3O

$56,400,000,000

Over $56 billion. That’s how much more Americans have paid in gas since the beginning of Trump’s Iran War - about $477 per household.

Families shouldn’t be paying the price for Trump’s reckless decisions.

ICE has now killed two unarmed people in the span of a week, neither of which were the target of a warrant. Agents didn’t have body cameras.

I’m angered and heartbroken for the families of these victims, and they deserve justice.

Republicans in Congress just threw another $70

California’s kids have been especially hurt by the Republicans’ Big Ugly Law. Congress needs to reverse these disastrous cuts to food assistance, because no child should be going hungry in the richest nation in the world. https://t.co/X9ScoSIG2W

RT @sciencedems: 🚨Democratic Members Demand Withdrawal of OMB’s Notice of Proposed Rulemaking, Condemn Attacks on Scientific Community

htt…

Trump said that his war of choice with Iran would last 4-5 weeks. We’re now over 4 months into this illegal and costly war, and even Congress decided it was time to end it via the War Powers Resolutions.

Americans can’t afford Trump’s endless wars.

Dr. Hussam Abu Safiya, a Palestinian pediatrician, has been held in an Israeli prison for 18 months with no charges and has reportedly been severely beaten. He needs to be released to get immediate medical care as well as any other prisoners being arbitrarily detained.

I visited @KitchenMarthas in San Jose yesterday to help serve dinner. Food kitchens like this have become even more important due to policies in Republicans’ Big Ugly Law, which slashed food assistance for over 4 million Americans.

We must reverse these cuts. https://t.co/lsdYIzTE9k
Trump gets very excited talking about his $600 million ballroom, but when it comes to lowering Americans’ housing costs….💤💤💤 https://t.co/s9j8DihjNo
RT @BradSherman: California wildfire survivors deserve the same timely federal disaster relief as every other disaster-impacted community.…

To see if you are impacted by these new changes, visit https://t.co/u92tKA2AOR. https://t.co/avYNdphyCh

I’m proud to have brought home over $63 million this year for community projects across #CA18! This project funding will help our cities build community centers, revitalize their downtowns, construct levees, and much more. https://t.co/1Yn3QxOXsg
Fun as always to participate in the annual Naglee Park 4th of July Parade! I hope everyone had a safe and joyous Independence Day weekend. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/l1JRwbpv4J

Happy 250th birthday to the United States of America! 🇺🇸 

We’ve overcome hard times as a country, and we still face many challenges today. But this Independence Day, we cherish the grand experiment that is American democracy and recommit to defending it for generations to come. https://t.co/rWP2vIVgpE

I met recently with the Latino Coalition of San Benito County to discuss their priorities and concerns, particularly challenges for farmworkers. I’m proud to represent San Benito County, and I’ll continue working to support opportunity and safety for Latino communities. https://t.co/yxPEKyLzL5
Another disappointing jobs report. Trump will try to blame others, but his own staff says this is his economy. https://t.co/7EPfBGTLHi

As Americans are getting crushed by high costs, Trump said that the largest housing affordability bill in decades is “so unimportant” and a “big yawn”. He would know about yawning. https://t.co/wdJuekdXFo
Your boss is refusing to sign the biggest housing affordability bill in decades, supported by a majority of Republicans and Democrats. Stop playing politics and get it done.

I had a wonderful meeting today with some Californians advocating on behalf of @UNAUSA and full funding for the United Nations. Our cooperation with other nations through the @UN is critical to address international crises like disease and climate change. https://t.co/E88AUvtFF4

While this decision should have been unanimous, today’s Supreme Court ruling affirmed the obvious: birthright citizenship is the law of the land and attempts to undermine the 14th Amendment will not stand. https://t.co/aZDcRzkUwX

Today marks 11 years since the Supreme Court ruled to legalize same-sex marriages nationwide. As an original vote against the discriminatory Defense of Marriage Act, I celebrate this historic step forward and will continue to support the fight for full LGBTQ+ equality. https://t.co/E4g99v92gb

Wishing a happy Father’s Day to all the dads and father figures in CA-18 and across the country. Thanks for your support and guidance, and may today create new fond memories with the ones we love.

Earlier this year, I presented a $900k check I secured for the new Sí Se Puede Behavior Health Center in Watsonville. On Friday, I was thrilled to speak at the grand opening!
